title: Master of Arts in Pastoral Studies
description: Advanced training for pastors and ministry professionals looking to deepen their theological and practical expertise.
fullDescription: Designed for individuals already holding a Bachelor's degree, the MAPS program offers rigorous intellectual engagement with pastoral care, preaching, and contemporary ethical dilemmas facing the church.
objectives: Synthesize complex theological concepts for pulpit ministry.
Provide expert-level soul care through biblical counseling.
Evaluate modern ethical issues from a Reformed perspective.
admissionRequirements: Bachelor of Theology or equivalent degree
Official Transcript of Records (GPA 2.5 or higher)
Letter of Intent and Research Interest
